hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished the task" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Subagent completed" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
echo 'CONTEXT REMINDER: Trinity project — Zig 0.15.x, VIBEE-first workflow, phi^2+1/phi^2=3. Skills: /fpga-synth, /vsa-verify, /vibee-gen, /trinity-test. MCP: trinity, needle, zig-docs.'

file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE 'trinity/output/|generated/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Cannot edit generated files. Modify the .vibee spec and run /vibee-gen."}}'; else exit 0; fi
file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.zig$'; then zig fmt "$file_path" 2>/dev/null; fi

file_path=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.v$'; then echo 'NOTICE: Verilog file modified. Consider running /fpga-synth to re-synthesize.'; fi
